message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #F5F5DC
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #808080
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #483D8B
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam activationBackgroundColor #A9A9A9
skinparam activationBorderColor #696969
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 2
skinparam conditionFontColor #0000FF
skinparam conditionBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam conditionBorderColor #000000
skinparam loopFontColor #0000FF
skinparam loopBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam loopBorderColor #000000
skinparam altFontColor #0000FF
skinparam altBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam altBorderColor #000000

participant "ebiz-salesman" as E
participant "guide-event" as G
participant "retail-sales" as R
participant "tsp" as T

E -> E: 1 监听账号合并消息，执行合并
E <- E: 2 返回
E -> E: 3 定时器扫表[扫描过滤出还未执行完成的明细任务], 并调用相应 processor 执行

alt [ 未完成 ]
    loop [ tsp 回调执行 ]
        E <- E: 4 返回，等待其他 processor 任务执行
        E -> E: 5
    end
else [ 完成 ]
    E -> G: 6 发送账号合并完成消息[一个导购可能在 N 多家店有身份，那么将发送出 N 条消息]
    G -> E: 7 ebiz-salesman 所有流程结束
    G -> G: 8 开始消息处理流程
    G -> G: 9 检查 apollo 是否开启帐号合并开关
    G <- G: 10
    G -> G: 11 检查 shopping_guide_event_task 表是否已经存在此任务
    note right of G: 以 task_id 作为幂等键, task_id = SG:AM-rootKdtId-fromUid-toUid
    G <- G: 12
    G -> G: 13 创建帐号合并任务，将任务写入表
    note right of G: 1.shopping_guide_event_task\n2.shopping_guide_event_detail_task\n3.shopping_guide_event_exec_task
    G <- G: 14
    G -> T: 15 创建 30 分钟延时任务，30分钟后检查并执行该任务
    T -> G: 16
    G <- G: 17 结束
end

@enduml
```
